prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7294→5866→4988→5796，近3年呈先升后降再升的波动走势；2025年基准约5796名，较2024年（4988）后移约808名，显 示竞争有所加剧；本省物理类计划2022年119人、2023年118人、2024年102人、2025年105人；2026年计划110人，较2025年小幅扩招约4.8%，扩招对竞争 压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第20名，近年排名稳定在前20，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学 校管理及师德师风事件（3件），但影响范围有限；抖音热度排名第66（一般），短视频曝光量一般；近5年无投档断档记录，报考心理较为平稳；化学工程与技 术A+、管理科学与工程A+、仪器科学与技术A、光学工程A、土木工程A、建筑学A、机械工程A、水利工程A等20个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业为高热推荐，与天大优势学科高度匹配，可能推高相关大类报考热度；本省2026年高考总人数约53.5万 ，较2025年（约46.3万）增长约15.6%，物理类估算约32.9万人，竞争明显加剧；天津大学位于 天津市，非四川省本土高校，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好；该校在四川招生计划近年稳定在100–120人区间，属中等规模招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年小 幅扩招（+4.8%）与考生总数大幅增长（+15.6%）的供需矛盾，以及工科高热专业对报考的拉动作用，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年5796名基础上继续后移；预测最低 位次约6000名，区间5500–6500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7294 → 5866 → 4988 → 5796, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again in recent three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 5796, which is about 808 places behind 2024 (4988), indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 119 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 102 in 2024, and 105 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, a slight expansion of about 4.8% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable among the top 20 in recent years, belonging to a top domestic engineering powerhouse; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving school management and teacher ethics incidents (3 cases), but the impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (average), short video exposure is average; no enrollment gaps in the past 5 years, indicating stable application psychology; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Architecture A, Mechanical Engineering A, Water Conservancy Engineering A, and 20 other A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other engineering majors are highly recommended, closely matching Tianjin University's strengths, potentially increasing application heat for related broad categories; the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from 2025 (about 463,000), with Physics Category estimated at about 329,000, significantly intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in Sichuan Province, so cross-province applications need to consider regional preferences; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan has been stable in the range of 100–120 in recent years, making it a medium-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the supply-demand contradiction of a slight expansion in 2026 (+4.8%) and a significant increase in total examinees (+15.6%), as well as the pulling effect of hot engineering majors on applications, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move back from the 2025 baseline of 5796; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6000, with a range of 5500–6500.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 History Category (including Liberal Arts) minimum rankings approximately 1120→1111→1319→1629, showing a continuous backward trend in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 518 places over the past 3 years; 2025 baseline approximately 1629; provincial History Category plans: 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 31 in 2025; 2026 plan 24, a reduction of about 22.6% compared to 2025, with a significant decrease in slots and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with top comprehensive strength; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative but with limited impact; Douyin popularity average; no record of admission gaps, stable application psychology; Architecture A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Landscape Architecture A-, etc., highly correlated with the Architecture category and Social Science Pilot Class (including Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning) in History Category admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Architecture category social popularity divided and waiting (civil engineering and architecture overall relatively cold), Social Science Pilot Class covers law, finance, etc., which are relatively popular majors; provincial History Category estimated about 206,000 candidates in 2026, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), intensifying competition; Tianjin University located in Tianjin, cross-province application; small enrollment scale in Sichuan History Category (20–30 range), enrollment plan changes have a sensitive impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in recent years, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-22.6%), and the increase in total candidates (+15.6%), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (competition intensification reduces ranking number) from the 2025 baseline of 1629; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1438, range 1274–1602.

- Architecture Category (Future Smart Human Settlement Excellence Talent Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only two admission majors, with rankings within the predicted range of 1274–1602. It is recommended to primarily apply for the Social Science Pilot Class; if ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<1274), you can aim for the Architecture Category; if ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>1602), the Social Science Pilot Class should be used as a safety choice. Both majors are enrolled under broad categories, so attention should be paid to specific directions during major distribution.
